name: 淘宝
htmlTemplate:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=290,initial-scale=1">
<style>
:root {
  --bg: #f5f5f5;
  --card: #fff;
  --text: #222;
  --text2: #333;
  --text3: #999;
  --text4: #bbb;
  --border: #eee;
  --border2: #f5f5f5;
  --accent: #ff3c00;
  --accent2: #ff6a00;
  --accent-light: #fff3e0;
  --nav-bg: #fff;
  --banner-bg: #fafafa;
  --shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.04);
  --badge-bg: rgba(0,0,0,.3);
  --input-bg: #f5f5f5;
  --del: #bbb;
  --hot: #ff6a00;
  --flash-bg: #fff;
  --me-gradient: linear-gradient(135deg,#ff3c00,#d63031);
  --bubble-bg: #333;
  --bubble-text: #fff;
  --toast-bg: rgba(0,0,0,.78);
  --toast-text: #fff;
  --skin-btn-bg: rgba(0,0,0,.06);
  --bargain-bg: #fff8e1;
  --bargain-text: #e65100;
  --wish-bg: #fafafa;
  --char-cart-bg: #fffbf0;
}
.night-mode {
  --bg: #1a1a1a;
  --card: #2a2a2a;
  --text: #e0e0e0;
  --text2: #ccc;
  --text3: #888;
  --text4: #666;
  --border: #3a3a3a;
  --border2: #333;
  --accent: #ff6a00;
  --accent2: #ff8c33;
  --accent-light: #2a2018;
  --nav-bg: #2a2a2a;
  --banner-bg: #222;
  --shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.2);
  --badge-bg: rgba(255,255,255,.15);
  --input-bg: #333;
  --del: #666;
  --hot: #ff8c33;
  --flash-bg: #2a2a2a;
  --me-gradient: linear-gradient(135deg,#8b2500,#6b1010);
  --bubble-bg: #555;
  --bubble-text: #fff;
  --toast-bg: rgba(255,255,255,.9);
  --toast-text: #222;
  --skin-btn-bg: rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  --bargain-bg: #3a2a10;
  --bargain-text: #ff8c33;
  --wish-bg: #2a2a2a;
  --char-cart-bg: #2a2018;
}

*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
html,body{background:transparent;font-family:-apple-system,"PingFang SC",sans-serif}
.ph{width:300px;height:580px;background:var(--bg);border-radius:32px;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:relative;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.18);transition:background .3s}

.sb{height:36px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:0 20px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);background:var(--nav-bg);flex-shrink:0;position:relative;z-index:2;transition:background .3s,color .3s}
.sb .is{position:absolute;top:6px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:95px;height:24px;background:#000;border-radius:12px}
.sb .right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:10px}

.pages{flex:1;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.page{position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--bg);overflow-y:auto;padding-bottom:8px;display:none;flex-direction:column;transition:background .3s}
.page.active{display:flex}
.page::-webkit-scrollbar{width:0}

.top-nav{background:var(--nav-bg);padding:6px 12px 8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-shrink:0;transition:background .3s}
.top-nav .brand{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:2px;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);white-space:nowrap}
.top-nav .brand small{font-size:10px;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;padding:0 4px;border-radius:2px;font-weight:500}
.top-nav .search{flex:1;background:var(--input-bg);border-radius:18px;padding:6px 12px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;transition:background .3s}
.top-nav .icon{font-size:18px;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer}
.top-nav .skin-btn{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--skin-btn-bg);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;margin-left:2px;transition:background .3s;border:none;outline:none}

.banner{display:flex;gap:6px;padding:8px 12px;flex-shrink:0;overflow-x:auto;scrollbar-width:none}
.banner::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
.banner .slide{flex-shrink:0;width:100%;height:80px;border-radius:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;text-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.2)}
.banner .s1{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ff6a00,#ee0979)}
.banner .s2{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a2980,#26d0ce)}
.banner .s3{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f7971e,#ffd200)}

.ticker-wrap{flex-shrink:0;height:32px;background:var(--card);margin:0 10px 6px;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:background .3s}
.ticker-track{display:flex;gap:0;animation:ticker-scroll 20s linear infinite;white-space:nowrap;align-items:center;height:100%}
.ticker-item{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);padding:0 16px;flex-shrink:0;transition:color .3s}
.ticker-item .ticker-name{font-weight:600;color:var(--accent)}
.ticker-item .ticker-dot{color:var(--text4)}
.ticker-item .ticker-share{font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;outline:none;padding:2px;margin-left:2px;transition:transform .15s}
.ticker-item .ticker-share:active{transform:scale(1.3)}
@keyframes ticker-scroll{0%{transform:translateX(0)}100%{transform:translateX(-50%)}}

.icons{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);padding:10px 8px;background:var(--card);margin:0 10px 8px;border-radius:12px;gap:6px 0;flex-shrink:0;transition:background .3s}
.icons .it{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;transition:color .3s}
.icons .it .ic{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px}

.flash{background:var(--card);margin:0 10px 10px;border-radius:12px;padding:10px;flex-shrink:0;transition:background .3s}
.flash-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px}
.flash-head .tt{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px}
.flash-head .tt small{font-size:10px;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:8px}
.flash-scroll{display:flex;gap:8px;overflow-x:auto;scrollbar-width:none}
.flash-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
.flash-item{flex-shrink:0;width:80px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .15s}
.flash-item:active{transform:scale(.95)}
.flash-item .img{width:72px;height:72px;margin:0 auto 4px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--banner-bg);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:28px;transition:background .3s}
.flash-item .nm{font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;transition:color .3s}
.flash-item .pr{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent)}
.flash-item .pr del{font-size:9px;color:var(--del);font-weight:400;margin-left:2px}
.flash-item .tag{font-size:8px;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;padding:0 4px;border-radius:3px;display:inline-block;margin-top:2px}

.guess{flex:1;padding:0 10px 10px}
.guess-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);padding:6px 0 8px;transition:color .3s}
.guess-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px}
.guess-card{background:var(--card);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow);cursor:pointer;transition:transform .15s,background .3s;position:relative}
.guess-card:active{transform:scale(.96)}
.guess-card .img{width:100%;aspect-ratio:1/1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:44px;background:var(--banner-bg);transition:background .3s}
.guess-card .info{padding:6px 8px 8px}
.guess-card .info .nm{font-size:11px;color:var(--text);display:-webkit-box;-webkit-line-clamp:2;-webkit-box-orient:vertical;overflow:hidden;line-height:1.3;transition:color .3s}
.guess-card .info .bottom{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:2px}
.guess-card .info .bottom .pr{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent)}
.guess-card .info .bottom .pr.bargained{color:var(--bargain-text);font-size:12px}
.guess-card .info .bottom .pr.bargained::after{content:' 🔪';font-size:10px}
.guess-card .info .bottom .like-btn{font-size:16px;cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;outline:none;padding:4px;min-width:32px;min-height:32px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:transform .2s}
.guess-card .info .bottom .like-btn:active{transform:scale(1.3)}
.guess-card .info .bottom .like-btn.liked{color:var(--accent)}
.guess-card .bargain-btn{position:absolute;top:4px;right:4px;width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bargain-bg);border:1px solid var(--bargain-text);color:var(--bargain-text);font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s;z-index:2}
.guess-card .bargain-btn:active{transform:scale(.85)}
.guess-card .bargain-btn.done{opacity:.4;pointer-events:none}

.flash-page{padding:10px}
.flash-banner{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ff3c00,#ff6a00);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;color:#fff;margin-bottom:10px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.flash-banner .tt{font-size:18px;font-weight:700}
.flash-banner .sub{font-size:10px;opacity:.8;margin-top:2px}
.flash-banner .countdown{position:absolute;right:14px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);background:var(--badge-bg);padding:4px 10px;border-radius:8px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px}
.flash-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
.flash-row{background:var(--card);border-radius:10px;padding:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:background .3s;position:relative}
.flash-row .img{width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:24px;background:var(--banner-bg);flex-shrink:0;transition:background .3s}
.flash-row .info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.flash-row .info .nm{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);transition:color .3s}
.flash-row .info .pr{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);margin-top:2px}
.flash-row .info .pr del{font-size:10px;color:var(--del);font-weight:400;margin-left:4px}
.flash-row .info .pr.bargained{color:var(--bargain-text)}
.flash-row .info .pr.bargained::after{content:' 🔪已砍';font-size:9px}
.flash-row .info .hot{font-size:9px;color:var(--hot);margin-top:2px}
.flash-row .btn-buy{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ff3c00,#ff6a00);color:#fff;border:none;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:14px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;transition:all .2s}
.flash-row .btn-buy:active{transform:scale(.9)}
.flash-row .btn-buy.done{background:#999;color:#fff}
.flash-row .bargain-btn{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bargain-bg);border:1px solid var(--bargain-text);color:var(--bargain-text);font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s;flex-shrink:0;margin-right:2px}
.flash-row .bargain-btn:active{transform:scale(.85)}
.flash-row .bargain-btn.done{opacity:.4;pointer-events:none}

.blindbox-section{padding:0 10px 10px;margin-top:4px}
.blindbox-card{background:var(--card);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;text-align:center;box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:background .3s}
.blindbox-card .bb-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:6px;transition:color .3s}
.blindbox-card .bb-box{font-size:48px;display:block;margin:6px 0}
.blindbox-card .bb-btn{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#9b59b6,#8e44ad);color:#fff;border:none;padding:8px 22px;border-radius:18px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;margin-top:4px}
.blindbox-card .bb-btn:active{transform:scale(.9)}
.blindbox-card .bb-btn.done{background:#999;cursor:not-allowed}
.blindbox-card .bb-result{font-size:12px;color:var(--accent);margin-top:8px;font-weight:600;min-height:18px}

.cart-page{padding:10px}
.cart-empty{text-align:center;padding:60px 20px;color:var(--text3);font-size:13px;transition:color .3s}
.cart-empty .big{font-size:48px;display:block;margin-bottom:12px}
.cart-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px}
.cart-item{background:var(--card);border-radius:10px;padding:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:background .3s}
.cart-item .img{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;background:var(--banner-bg);flex-shrink:0;transition:background .3s}
.cart-item .info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.cart-item .info .nm{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);transition:color .3s}
.cart-item .info .pr{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent)}
.cart-item .info .pr.free{color:#9b59b6}
.cart-item .qty-ctl{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.cart-item .qty-ctl button{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--card);color:var(--text2);font-size:16px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:0;transition:all .3s}
.cart-item .qty-ctl button:active{transform:scale(.9)}
.cart-item .qty-ctl .num{min-width:20px;text-align:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);transition:color .3s}
.cart-footer{background:var(--card);border-radius:12px;padding:12px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 -2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.05);transition:background .3s}
.cart-footer .total{font-size:14px;color:var(--text2);transition:color .3s}
.cart-footer .total .pr{font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent)}
.cart-footer .btn-checkout{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ff3c00,#ff6a00);color:#fff;border:none;padding:10px 24px;border-radius:22px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer}
.cart-footer .btn-checkout:active{transform:scale(.95)}
.cart-footer .btn-checkout:disabled{background:#ccc;cursor:not-allowed}

.cart-toast{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(.8);background:var(--toast-bg);color:var(--toast-text);padding:16px 22px;border-radius:14px;font-size:13px;text-align:center;z-index:10;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;transition:all .25s}
.cart-toast.show{opacity:1;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1)}

.msg-list{padding:10px}
.msg-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:var(--card);padding:12px;border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:8px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);cursor:pointer;transition:background .3s}
.msg-item:active{transform:scale(.97)}
.msg-item .av{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--banner-bg);transition:background .3s}
.msg-item .info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.msg-item .info .nm{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);transition:color .3s}
.msg-item .info .prev{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;transition:color .3s}
.msg-item .time{font-size:10px;color:var(--text4);flex-shrink:0;transition:color .3s}

.me-header{background:var(--me-gradient);padding:20px 16px 16px;color:#fff;border-radius:0 0 20px 20px;margin-bottom:10px;transition:background .3s}
.me-header .top{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;position:relative}
.me-header .top .av{width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:28px;cursor:pointer;position:relative;transition:transform .15s}
.me-header .top .av:active{transform:scale(.9)}
.me-header .top .info .nm{font-size:16px;font-weight:700}
.me-header .top .info .lv{font-size:10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);padding:2px 10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:4px;display:inline-block}
.me-header .stats{display:flex;justify-content:space-around;margin-top:14px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2)}
.me-header .stats .st{text-align:center}
.me-header .stats .st .num{font-size:16px;font-weight:700}
.me-header .stats .st .lb{font-size:9px;opacity:.7;margin-top:2px}

.signin-wrap{text-align:center;margin-top:10px}
.signin-btn{background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);color:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.3);padding:6px 18px;border-radius:16px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;font-weight:600}
.signin-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.3)}
.signin-btn:active{transform:scale(.9)}
.signin-btn.done{background:rgba(255,215,0,.3);border-color:rgba(255,215,0,.5);cursor:default}
.signin-toast{font-size:10px;color:#ffd700;margin-top:4px;min-height:16px;transition:all .3s}

.poke-bubble{position:absolute;left:64px;top:-4px;background:var(--bubble-bg);color:var(--bubble-text);padding:6px 10px;border-radius:10px;font-size:10px;white-space:nowrap;opacity:0;transform:translateY(4px);pointer-events:none;transition:all .25s;z-index:5;max-width:180px;white-space:normal;line-height:1.4}
.poke-bubble.show{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.poke-bubble::after{content:'';position:absolute;left:-6px;top:10px;width:0;height:0;border-top:5px solid transparent;border-bottom:5px solid transparent;border-right:6px solid var(--bubble-bg)}

.fortune-wrap{background:var(--card);margin:0 10px 10px;border-radius:12px;padding:12px;text-align:center;box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:background .3s}
.fortune-wrap .ft-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:6px;transition:color .3s}
.fortune-wrap .ft-btn{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f7971e,#ffd200);color:#3d2700;border:none;padding:6px 18px;border-radius:14px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.fortune-wrap .ft-btn:active{transform:scale(.9)}
.fortune-wrap .ft-result{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-top:8px;min-height:20px;transition:all .2s}

.wish-wrap{background:var(--card);margin:0 10px 10px;border-radius:12px;padding:12px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:background .3s}
.wish-wrap .wish-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:8px;transition:color .3s}
.wish-wrap .wish-input-row{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px}
.wish-wrap .wish-input-row input{flex:1;padding:6px 10px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--input-bg);color:var(--text);font-size:11px;outline:none;transition:all .3s}
.wish-wrap .wish-input-row input::placeholder{color:var(--text4)}
.wish-wrap .wish-input-row button{padding:6px 12px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;transition:all .2s}
.wish-wrap .wish-input-row button:active{transform:scale(.9)}
.wish-wrap .wish-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;max-height:120px;overflow-y:auto}
.wish-wrap .wish-list::-webkit-scrollbar{width:0}
.wish-wrap .wish-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:5px 8px;background:var(--wish-bg);border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;transition:background .3s}
.wish-wrap .wish-item .wish-name{flex:1;color:var(--text2)}
.wish-wrap .wish-item .wish-price{color:var(--accent);font-weight:600}
.wish-wrap .wish-item .wish-send{font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;outline:none;padding:2px;transition:transform .15s}
.wish-wrap .wish-item .wish-send:active{transform:scale(1.3)}
.wish-wrap .wish-empty{font-size:10px;color:var(--text4);text-align:center;padding:8px 0}

.char-cart-wrap{background:var(--card);margin:0 10px 10px;border-radius:12px;padding:12px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:background .3s}
.char-cart-wrap .cc-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;transition:color .3s}
.char-cart-wrap .cc-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px}
.char-cart-wrap .cc-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:5px 8px;background:var(--char-cart-bg);border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;transition:background .3s}
.char-cart-wrap .cc-item .cc-icon{font-size:16px}
.char-cart-wrap .cc-item .cc-name{flex:1;color:var(--text2)}
.char-cart-wrap .cc-item .cc-price{color:var(--accent);font-weight:600}
.char-cart-wrap .cc-send-btn{display:block;width:100%;margin-top:8px;padding:7px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--accent);background:rgba(255,60,0,.08);color:var(--accent);font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.char-cart-wrap .cc-send-btn:active{transform:scale(.95)}

.me-orders{background:var(--card);margin:0 10px 10px;border-radius:12px;padding:10px;transition:background .3s}
.me-orders .tit{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:8px;transition:color .3s}
.me-orders .grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:4px;text-align:center}
.me-orders .grid .oi .num{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);transition:color .3s}
.me-orders .grid .oi .lb{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;transition:color .3s}
.me-badges{display:flex;gap:6px;padding:8px 10px;margin:0 10px 10px;background:var(--card);border-radius:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;transition:background .3s}
.me-badges .badge{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ffd700,#ffb300);color:#7a5a00;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:12px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600}
.me-menu{background:var(--card);margin:0 10px;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;transition:background .3s}
.me-menu .row{display:flex;align-items:center;padding:12px 14px;border-bottom:.5px solid var(--border2);cursor:pointer;gap:10px;transition:all .3s}
.me-menu .row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.me-menu .row:active{background:var(--bg)}
.me-menu .row .ic{font-size:16px;width:24px;text-align:center}
.me-menu .row .nm{flex:1;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);transition:color .3s}
.me-menu .row .ar{color:var(--text4);font-size:14px}

.b-bar{flex-shrink:0;height:52px;background:var(--nav-bg);display:flex;justify-content:space-around;align-items:center;border-top:.5px solid var(--border);color:var(--text3);font-size:10px;position:relative;z-index:2;padding-bottom:max(4px, env(safe-area-inset-bottom));transition:all .3s}
.b-bar .item{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:1px;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:transparent;padding:0 8px;font-family:inherit;position:relative;color:var(--text3);transition:color .3s}
.b-bar .item .ic{font-size:20px;line-height:1;transition:transform .1s}
.b-bar .item:active .ic{transform:scale(.8)}
.b-bar .item .lb{font-size:9px}
.b-bar .item.on .lb,.b-bar .item.on .ic{color:var(--accent)}
.b-bar .item .cart-badge{position:absolute;top:-2px;right:-4px;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;min-width:16px;height:16px;border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:0 4px;border:2px solid var(--nav-bg)}
.b-bar .item .cart-badge.bump{animation:bump .3s ease}
@keyframes bump{0%,100%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.35)}}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="ph" id="phone">
  <div class="sb"><span id="t">00:00</span><div class="is"></div><div class="right">📶 <span id="bat">85</span>%</div></div>

  <div class="pages">
    <div class="page active" id="page-home">
      <div class="top-nav">
        <div class="brand">淘宝<small>天猫</small></div>
        <div class="search"><span>🔍</span><span>搜索你想要的宝贝</span></div>
        <div class="icon">🔔</div>
        <button class="skin-btn" id="skinBtn" title="切换夜间模式">🌙</button>
      </div>
      <div class="banner"><div class="slide s1">🔥 新年大促</div><div class="slide s2">⚡ 限时特惠</div><div class="slide s3">🎁 品牌闪购</div></div>
      <div class="ticker-wrap"><div class="ticker-track" id="tickerTrack"></div></div>
      <div class="icons">
        <div class="it"><span class="ic" style="background:#fce4ec;">🛒</span>天猫</div>
        <div class="it"><span class="ic" style="background:#e8f5e9;">⚡</span>聚划算</div>
        <div class="it"><span class="ic" style="background:#e3f2fd;">📺</span>直播</div>
        <div class="it"><span class="ic" style="background:#fff3e0;">📱</span>充值</div>
        <div class="it"><span class="ic" style="background:#f3e5f5;">🍔</span>饿了么</div>
      </div>
      <div class="flash">
        <div class="flash-head"><span class="tt">⏰ 限时秒杀 <small>正在抢</small></span></div>
        <div class="flash-scroll" id="flashScroll"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="guess"><div class="guess-title">✨ 猜你喜欢</div><div class="guess-grid" id="guessGrid"></div></div>
    </div>

    <div class="page" id="page-flash">
      <div class="flash-page">
        <div class="flash-banner">
          <div class="tt">🔥 百亿补贴 · 限时抢</div>
          <div class="sub">官方补贴 正品保证</div>
          <div class="countdown" id="countdown">23:59:59</div>
        </div>
        <div class="flash-list" id="flashList"></div>
        <div class="blindbox-section">
          <div class="blindbox-card">
            <div class="bb-title">🎁 神秘盲盒 · 戳我免单</div>
            <span class="bb-box">🎁</span>
            <div class="bb-result" id="bbResult"></div>
            <button class="bb-btn" id="bbBtn">戳我抽免单</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="page" id="page-cart">
      <div class="cart-page" style="position:relative;">
        <div id="cartContent"></div>
        <div class="cart-toast" id="cartToast"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="page" id="page-msg">
      <div class="msg-list" id="msgList"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="page" id="page-me">
      <div class="me-header">
        <div class="top" style="position:relative;">
          <div class="av" id="meAvatar">🐱</div>
          <div class="poke-bubble" id="pokeBubble"></div>
          <div class="info">
            <div class="nm" id="meName">用户</div>
            <div class="lv">👑 会员 Lv.<span id="meLv">5</span> · <span id="meExp">1280</span> 经验值</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="stats">
          <div class="st"><div class="num" id="meFollowers">328</div><div class="lb">粉丝</div></div>
          <div class="st"><div class="num" id="meLikes">1.2k</div><div class="lb">获赞</div></div>
          <div class="st"><div class="num" id="meCoins">2660</div><div class="lb">淘金币</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="signin-wrap">
          <button class="signin-btn" id="signinBtn">🪙 签到领金币</button>
          <div class="signin-toast" id="signinToast"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fortune-wrap">
        <div class="ft-title">🔮 每日运势 · 测手气</div>
        <div class="ft-result" id="fortuneResult"></div>
        <button class="ft-btn" id="fortuneBtn">🎲 测一测</button>
      </div>
      <div class="wish-wrap">
        <div class="wish-title">💝 我的心愿单 · 找Char要礼物</div>
        <div class="wish-input-row">
          <input type="text" id="wishNameInput" placeholder="想要什么？" maxlength="20">
          <input type="text" id="wishPriceInput" placeholder="预算¥" maxlength="8" style="width:60px;flex:none;">
          <button id="wishAddBtn">+添加</button>
        </div>
        <div class="wish-list" id="wishList">
          <div class="wish-empty">还没有心愿，快添加一个吧~</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="char-cart-wrap" id="charCartWrap">
        <div class="cc-title">🛒 <span id="charCartName">Char</span>的购物车</div>
        <div class="cc-list" id="charCartList"></div>
        <button class="cc-send-btn" id="charCartSendBtn">📤 帮Char清空购物车</button>
      </div>
      <div class="me-orders">
        <div class="tit">📦 我的订单</div>
        <div class="grid">
          <div class="oi"><div class="num">0</div><div class="lb">待付款</div></div>
          <div class="oi"><div class="num">0</div><div class="lb">待发货</div></div>
          <div class="oi"><div class="num">1</div><div class="lb">待收货</div></div>
          <div class="oi"><div class="num">0</div><div class="lb">待评价</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="me-badges" id="badgeContainer"></div>
      <div class="me-menu" id="meMenu"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="b-bar">
    <button class="item on" data-tab="home"><span class="ic">🏠</span><span class="lb">首页</span></button>
    <button class="item" data-tab="flash"><span class="ic">⚡</span><span class="lb">抢购</span></button>
    <button class="item" data-tab="cart" id="cartTab"><span class="ic">🛒</span><span class="lb">购物车</span><span class="cart-badge" id="cartBadge" style="display:none">0</span></button>
    <button class="item" data-tab="msg"><span class="ic">💬</span><span class="lb">消息</span></button>
    <button class="item" data-tab="me"><span class="ic">👤</span><span class="lb">我的</span></button>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="tbData" style="display:none"
  data-g1_name="{{1.g1_name}}" data-g1_price="{{1.g1_price}}" data-g1_icon="{{1.g1_icon}}"
  data-g2_name="{{1.g2_name}}" data-g2_price="{{1.g2_price}}" data-g2_icon="{{1.g2_icon}}"
  data-g3_name="{{1.g3_name}}" data-g3_price="{{1.g3_price}}" data-g3_icon="{{1.g3_icon}}"
  data-g4_name="{{1.g4_name}}" data-g4_price="{{1.g4_price}}" data-g4_icon="{{1.g4_icon}}"
  data-g5_name="{{1.g5_name}}" data-g5_price="{{1.g5_price}}" data-g5_icon="{{1.g5_icon}}"
  data-g6_name="{{1.g6_name}}" data-g6_price="{{1.g6_price}}" data-g6_icon="{{1.g6_icon}}"
  data-me_name="{{1.me_name}}"
  data-me_avatar="{{1.me_avatar}}"
  data-me_whisper="{{1.me_whisper}}"
></div>

<div id="pokePhrases" style="display:none"
  data-p0="别戳了，再戳我就告诉{{char}}你偷懒！"
  data-p1="{{char}}说你再戳我他就亲自来收拾你~"
  data-p2="哎呀！你戳到我的痒痒肉了！"
  data-p3="你再戳？{{char}}正在看着你呢👀"
  data-p4="呜呜呜我要告诉{{char}}你欺负我！"
  data-p5="戳一下=欠{{char}}一次惩罚，你自己算吧"
  data-p6="{{char}}刚才问我谁在戳你，我说不知道…"
  data-p7="好痛！{{char}}快来救我！"
></div>

<script>
(function(){
  'use strict';

  function $(s){ return document.querySelector(s); }
  function $$(s){ return document.querySelectorAll(s); }

  function esc(s){
    return String(s).replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"').replace(/'/g,''');
  }

  (function(){
    var n = new Date();
    document.getElementById('t').textContent = String(n.getHours()).padStart(2,'0') + ':' + String(n.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0');
    var bat = Math.floor(70 + Math.random() * 30);
    var batEl = document.getElementById('bat');
    batEl.textContent = bat;
    if(bat <= 20) batEl.style.color = '#ff3c00';
  })();

  var isNight = false;
  var skinBtn = document.getElementById('skinBtn');
  skinBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){
    isNight = !isNight;
    var phone = document.getElementById('phone');
    if(isNight){ phone.classList.add('night-mode'); skinBtn.textContent = '☀️'; }
    else { phone.classList.remove('night-mode'); skinBtn.textContent = '🌙'; }
  });

  function getData(){
    var dataEl = document.getElementById('tbData');
    var raw = (dataEl && dataEl.dataset) ? dataEl.dataset : {};
    function v(k, def){
      var s = raw[k];
      if(s === undefined || s === null) return def;
      s = String(s).trim();
      if(!s || s.indexOf('{{') === 0) return def;
      return s;
    }
    var items = [];
    for(var i = 1; i <= 6; i++){
      var name = v('g'+i+'_name', '');
      var price = parseFloat(v('g'+i+'_price', '0')) || 0;
      var icon = v('g'+i+'_icon', '');
      if(name && price > 0 && icon){ items.push({ id: 'g'+i, name: name, price: price, icon: icon }); }
    }
    if(items.length === 0){
      var defaults = [
        { id:'d1', name:'舒适抱枕', price:39.9, icon:'🛏️' },
        { id:'d2', name:'保温杯', price:59.9, icon:'☕' },
        { id:'d3', name:'蓝牙耳机', price:129, icon:'🎧' },
        { id:'d4', name:'可爱手机壳', price:19.9, icon:'📱' },
        { id:'d5', name:'零食大礼包', price:49.9, icon:'🍪' },
        { id:'d6', name:'桌面小风扇', price:79, icon:'🌀' }
      ];
      items.push.apply(items, defaults);
    }
    var extraDefaults = [
      { id:'ex1', name:'香薰蜡烛', price:29.9, icon:'🕯️' },
      { id:'ex2', name:'卡通拖鞋', price:25.9, icon:'👟' }
    ];
    var me = {
      name: v('me_name', '用户'),
      avatar: v('me_avatar', '🐱'),
      whisper: v('me_whisper', '今天也是元气满满的一天~')
    };
    return { items: items, extraDefaults: extraDefaults, me: me };
  }

  var appData = getData();
  var items = appData.items;
  var extraDefaults = appData.extraDefaults;

  var bargainedPrices = {};
  var cart = [];
  var cartTotal = 0;
  var blindboxUsed = false;
  var blindboxItemId = null;

  var LINK_KEYWORDS = {
    '项圈': { key: 'obedience', delta: 5, label: '服从+5' },
    '颈圈': { key: 'obedience', delta: 5, label: '服从+5' },
    '锁链': { key: 'obedience', delta: 5, label: '服从+5' },
    '跳蛋': { key: 'excitement', delta: 5, label: '兴奋+5' },
    '震动': { key: 'excitement', delta: 5, label: '兴奋+5' },
    '按摩棒': { key: 'excitement', delta: 5, label: '兴奋+5' },
    '手铐': { key: 'obedience', delta: 5, label: '服从+5' },
    '束缚': { key: 'obedience', delta: 5, label: '服从+5' },
    '绳子': { key: 'obedience', delta: 5, label: '服从+5' },
    '贞操锁': { key: 'shame', delta: 5, label: '羞耻+5' },
    '贞操带': { key: 'shame', delta: 5, label: '羞耻+5' },
    '蜡烛': { key: 'excitement', delta: 5, label: '兴奋+5' },
    '低温': { key: 'excitement', delta: 5, label: '兴奋+5' },
    '鞭子': { key: 'excitement', delta: 5, label: '兴奋+5' }
  };

  function detectLinkEffects(cartItems){
    var effects = {};
    cartItems.forEach(function(item){
      Object.keys(LINK_KEYWORDS).forEach(function(kw){
        if(item.name.indexOf(kw) !== -1){
          var eff = LINK_KEYWORDS[kw];
          if(!effects[eff.key]) effects[eff.key] = { delta: 0, labels: [] };
          effects[eff.key].delta += eff.delta;
          if(effects[eff.key].labels.indexOf(eff.label) === -1) effects[eff.key].labels.push(eff.label);
        }
      });
    });
    return effects;
  }

  function updateCartBadge(){
    var badge = document.getElementById('cartBadge');
    var count = cart.reduce(function(s, i){ return s + i.qty; }, 0);
    if(count > 0){
      badge.style.display = 'flex';
      badge.textContent = count > 99 ? '99+' : count;
      badge.classList.add('bump');
      setTimeout(function(){ badge.classList.remove('bump'); }, 300);
    } else { badge.style.display = 'none'; }
  }

  function renderCart(){
    var container = document.getElementById('cartContent');
    if(cart.length === 0){
      container.innerHTML = '<div class="cart-empty"><span class="big">🛒</span>购物车是空的<br>去首页和抢购逛逛吧</div>';
      return;
    }
    var html = '<div class="cart-list">';
    var total = 0;
    cart.forEach(function(item, idx){
      var isFree = (blindboxItemId && item.id === blindboxItemId);
      var price = isFree ? 0 : (bargainedPrices[item.id] || item.price);
      var sub = price * item.qty;
      total += sub;
      var priceHTML = isFree ? '<div class="pr free">¥0.00 🎁免单</div>' : '<div class="pr">¥' + price.toFixed(2) + (bargainedPrices[item.id] ? ' 🔪已砍' : '') + '</div>';
      html += '<div class="cart-item">' +
        '<div class="img">' + esc(item.icon) + '</div>' +
        '<div class="info"><div class="nm">' + esc(item.name) + '</div>' + priceHTML + '</div>' +
        '<div class="qty-ctl">' +
          '<button data-cart-idx="' + idx + '" data-cart-delta="-1">−</button>' +
          '<span class="num">' + item.qty + '</span>' +
          '<button data-cart-idx="' + idx + '" data-cart-delta="1">+</button>' +
        '</div></div>';
    });
    html += '</div>';
    html += '<div class="cart-footer">' +
      '<div class="total">合计 <span class="pr">¥' + total.toFixed(2) + '</span></div>' +
      '<button class="btn-checkout" id="checkoutBtn">去结算</button></div>';
    container.innerHTML = html;
    cartTotal = total;

    container.querySelectorAll('.qty-ctl button').forEach(function(btn){
      btn.addEventListener('click', function(){
        var idx = parseInt(this.dataset.cartIdx, 10);
        var delta = parseInt(this.dataset.cartDelta, 10);
        cartQty(idx, delta);
      });
    });
    var checkoutBtn = document.getElementById('checkoutBtn');
    if(checkoutBtn){ checkoutBtn.addEventListener('click', checkout); }
  }

  function cartQty(idx, delta){
    if(!cart[idx]) return;
    cart[idx].qty += delta;
    if(cart[idx].qty <= 0) cart.splice(idx, 1);
    updateCartBadge();
    renderCart();
  }

  function addToCart(item){
    var isFree = (blindboxItemId && item.id === blindboxItemId);
    var price = isFree ? 0 : (bargainedPrices[item.id] || item.price);
    var addItem = { id: item.id, icon: item.icon, name: item.name, price: price, qty: 1, isFree: isFree };
    var exist = cart.find(function(i){ return i.id === item.id; });
    if(exist){ exist.qty += 1; }
    else { cart.push(addItem); }
    updateCartBadge();
    renderCart();
    switchTab('cart');
  }

  function checkout(){
    if(cart.length === 0) return;
    var parts = [];
    var total = 0;
    cart.forEach(function(i){
      var isFree = (blindboxItemId && i.id === blindboxItemId);
      var price = isFree ? 0 : (bargainedPrices[i.id] || i.price);
      var label = isFree ? '🎁免单「' + i.name + '」' : '「' + i.name + '」';
      parts.push(label + '×' + i.qty);
      if(!isFree) total += price * i.qty;
    });

    var effects = detectLinkEffects(cart);
    var linkText = '';
    if(Object.keys(effects).length > 0){
      var labels = [];
      Object.keys(effects).forEach(function(k){
        labels.push.apply(labels, effects[k].labels);
      });
      linkText = '\n📊联动更新：' + labels.join(' ');
    }

    var msg = '（我在淘宝结算了购物车：' + parts.join('、') + '，一共 ¥' + total.toFixed(2) + '，坐等收货！' + linkText + '）';
    try { parent.postMessage({ type: 'chat-input-fill', text: msg }, '*'); } catch(e) {}

    var toast = document.getElementById('cartToast');
    toast.textContent = '✅ 结算成功！已下单';
    toast.classList.add('show');
    setTimeout(function(){ toast.classList.remove('show'); }, 1200);

    cart = [];
    blindboxUsed = false;
    blindboxItemId = null;
    bargainedPrices = {};
    updateCartBadge();
    renderCart();
    resetBlindbox();
    resetAllBargainButtons();
    setTimeout(function(){ switchTab('home'); }, 600);
  }

  function toggleLike(btn, name){
    if(btn.classList.contains('liked')){
      btn.classList.remove('liked');
      btn.textContent = '🤍';
      return;
    }
    btn.classList.add('liked');
    btn.textContent = '❤️';
    try { parent.postMessage({ type: 'chat-input-fill', text: '（我在淘宝收藏了「' + name + '」✨）' }, '*'); } catch(e) {}
  }

  function doBargain(itemId, originalPrice, btnEl, priceEl){
    if(btnEl.classList.contains('done')) return;
    btnEl.classList.add('done');
    var rate = 0.5 + Math.random() * 0.4;
    var newPrice = Math.round(originalPrice * rate * 10) / 10;
    bargainedPrices[itemId] = newPrice;
    if(priceEl){
      priceEl.textContent = '¥' + newPrice.toFixed(2);
      priceEl.classList.add('bargained');
    }
    var toast = document.getElementById('cartToast');
    toast.textContent = '🔪 砍价成功！¥' + originalPrice.toFixed(2) + ' → ¥' + newPrice.toFixed(2);
    toast.classList.add('show');
    setTimeout(function(){ toast.classList.remove('show'); }, 1500);
  }

  function resetAllBargainButtons(){
    bargainedPrices = {};
    document.querySelectorAll('.bargain-btn').forEach(function(b){ b.classList.remove('done'); });
    document.querySelectorAll('.pr.bargained').forEach(function(p){ p.classList.remove('bargained'); });
  }

  var flashItems = items.slice(0, 3);
  var guessItems = items.slice(0, 6);
  while(guessItems.length < 8){
    var ex = extraDefaults[guessItems.length - 6];
    if(ex) guessItems.push(ex);
    else break;
  }
  var grabItems = items.slice(0, 6);

  var flashHtml = '';
  flashItems.forEach(function(item){

    var pokeEl = document.getElementById('pokePhrases');

    // {{char}} 已被平台替换为真实角色名
    var match = p0.match(/告诉(.+?)你偷懒/);
    if(match && match[1] && match[1] !== '{{char}}') return match[1];
    // 兜底：从其他短语提取
    for(var i = 1; i < 8; i++){
      var p = pokeEl.dataset['p' + i] || '';
      var m2 = p.match(/(.+?)说/);
      if(m2 && m2[1] && m2[1] !== '{{char}}') return m2[1];
      var m3 = p.match(/告诉(.+?)你/);
      if(m3 && m3[1] && m3[1] !== '{{char}}') return m3[1];
      var m4 = p.match(/欠(.+?)一次/);
      if(m4 && m4[1] && m4[1] !== '{{char}}') return m4[1];
      var m5 = p.match(/(.+?)刚才/);
      if(m5 && m5[1] && m5[1] !== '{{char}}') return m5[1];
      var m6 = p.match(/(.+?)快来/);
